ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Theresa Nagle for David Garner.

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Continued To May-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Theresa Nagle for David Garner (Petitioner).

Ms. Nagle stated that the Decedent was 85 years old, that he signed the will about twenty years ago, that the person named as the Executor (David Garner) found the will after several weeks of going through the apartment, that there were piles and piles of paper, and that he found it in a stack of papers in a will envelope. Ms. Nagle also stated that the Decedent had given a copy of the will to the proposed Executor and another Neighbor, that the original will was lodged on April 3, 2017 and that she attached a copy of Mr. Garner's copy of the will to the petition. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to May 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Nagle to provide Mr. Garner's copy of the will to the Court.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
